obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_28_: Battles will go&a lot faster!&That's all!/%
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_33_: You can ACT&and SPARE on&the same turn!/
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_34_: If you know Kris's&ACT will give an&enemy 100`% mercy.../
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_35_: SPARE them on&the same turn&with Susie&or Ralsei!/%
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_40_: * Jigsaw Joe looks vulnerable to ACTING and SPARING on the same turn.
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_56_: Boss^1!&You gotta ACT&and SPARE on&the same turn!/%
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_60_: * Jigsaw Joe looks like he could use a bedtime story.
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_63_: \M2WAIT A SECOND!!!^1&I got something else&to remind you of!/
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_65_: It works the&same with making&an enemy TIRED!/
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_66_: If an ACT&will make an&enemy TIRED.../
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_82_: * Jigsaw Joe drank coffee^1! Jigsaw Joe stopped being TIRED!/%
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_89_: Boss^1! If you don't&have the TP to use&PACIFY^1, DEFENDing&will give you TP!/%
obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_91_: Boss^1! You're putting me&to SLEEP^1! I mean, you&AREN'T^1! Make me TIRED&and PACIFY me, boss!/%

obj_dojo_spareenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_195: * Susie told the enemy a bedtime story about beating them up!^1&* The enemy became TIRED!/%
obj_npc_cafe_slash_Other_10_gml_105_0: * We'll make sure to clean our plates^1.&* (Sukkiri.)/%
obj_npc_cafe_slash_Other_10_gml_111_0: * Boss^1, are you enjoying your \cYButler Cafe\c0?/%
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_5_0: * Oh hey hey hey hey hey./
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_6_0: * Listen up. See that \cYweird circle\cW on the beach?/
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_7_0: * Yesterday I \cYwaited\cW on it^1, and \cYsomething weird\cW came out./
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_8_0: * Of course^1, it's not \cYyesterday\cW anymore^1, so too bad!/%
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_11_0: * Oh hey hey hey hey hey./
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_12_0: * When that thing showed up^1, I called it weird./
obj_npc_clamguy_slash_Other_10_gml_13_0: * It sunk back into the water..^1. don't think it's coming back!/%
obj_npc_dojo_slash_Step_0_gml_99_0: ＊ でも　ボスはもう賞品を獲得済みだ^1。&　 これ以上あげられるものはないぜ！/%
scr_itemdesc_single_slash_scr_itemdesc_s: A shimmering shard.#Its value increases each Chapter.
A dollar with a certain dog on it.#Its value decreases each Chapter.
scr_keyiteminfo_slash_scr_keyiteminfo_gm: A stone statue.#Strangely, it looks like Lancer...
The shadow purified by the cat
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_19_0: * You took it from your pocket^1.&* You have a \cYvery^1, very^1, bad feeling\c0 about throwing it away./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_4173_0: * Could you bring it by to me \cYtomorrow\c0?/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_5507_0: \EC* (...actually^1, uh^1, maybe Kris wouldn't know what to do...)/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7339_0: * (It's a manhole. There's a ladder leading inside.)/
